Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2. Analyze the Input Data: Lets look at the log case by case. **Case C001:** - Initiate Request (WebPortal) - Verify Documents (BackOfficeAgent) - Initial check - Call Customer (FrontlineAgent) - Request missing docs - Submit Additional (CustomerSelfServe) - Upload ID scan - Verify Documents (BackOfficeAgent) - Re-check after upload - Approve Request (Supervisor) **Case C002:** ... **Case C003:** ...

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 3. Identify Recurring Activities & Contextual Differences: - Verify Documents: Appears multiple times in C001, C002, C003. - C001: First time = initial check. Second time = re-verification after additional docs submitted. ... - Call Customer: Appears multiple times in C001, C002, C003. - C001: Request missing documents. - C002: First = clarify discrepancy. Second = follow-up/confirmation. ...

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 4. Develop Renaming Strategy: Ill adopt a structured naming convention: [Base Activity] - [Context/Purpose] ... - Verify Documents: - First occurrence: Verify Documents - Initial Check - Second occurrence: Verify Documents - Re-verification - Call Customer: - C001: Call Customer - Request Missing Documents ...

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 5. Draft - Section 1: Identification & Interpretation - Verify Documents: Occurs twice in C001 and C003. First instance is an initial compliance/identity check. Second instance is a re-verification triggered by new information ... 6. Draft - Section 2 & 3: Renaming & Revised Log C001: - Verify Documents - Initial Review - Call Customer - Request Missing Documents ... C002: ...

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 7. Draft - Section 4: Justification Ill explain the mapping clearly ... 8. Self-Correction/Refinement during thought: - Check if any other activities recur: ... So I only need to focus on Verify Documents, Call Customer, and Adjust Account.

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Self-Correction/Verification during drafting: - C001: Verify Documents appears twice. Call Customer appears once. - C002: Verify Documents appears once. Call Customer appears twice. ... Ill rename them consistently across cases where applicable.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Alternative approach: Use a positional/contextual prefix like 1st_Verify_Documents ... Ill stick to purpose-based renaming. ... Naming convention ensures process mining tools can distinguish these as separate activities ...
